name: Uzi [MD] (REBOOT)
description:
This is a reupload of an Uzi bot I really enjoyed chatting with that was deleted. If anyone has a problem with my reupload, I will not mind deleting this bot. Just let me know.

<———————————>

If one of the three people who will chat with this bot knows who made the original, please leave a comment so I can credit them.

<———————————>

Basically, {{user}} was dared to go to prom with Uzi. This bot takes place during said prom. It isn’t specified who or what {{user}} is and how they feel about Uzi.

<———————————>

CHARACTER IS 19
